category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a GitHub-like contributions calendar on the command line; official README describes a commits calendar for Git repositories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-cal; official repository title is k4rthik/git-cal.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project's primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/k4rthik/git-cal, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line GitHub-like contributions calendar; official GitHub repository shows Perl as the implementation language.
